enrichment method: the IMAC microspheres with enriched phosphopeptides
fractionation method: the peptides were first separated into 60 fractions
fragmentation method: subjected to LC-MS/MS analysis with HCD fragmentation
instrument: on a Q Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
ionization type: with a Finnigan Nanospray II electrospray ionization source
labeling: identified by tandem mass tag (TMT) quantification
